ocr.text: In the 3rd Quarter of 2023, Vonovia SE's co-working space metrics reflect a total revenue of $5.2M and a net income of $1.5M,
with an occupancy rate of 87%. The average rent per square foot stands at $25.00, total expenses amount to $2.1M, and capital
expenditures (CAPEX) are recorded at $2.1M. In the preceding 2nd Quarter of 2023, the financial performance showed total
revenue of $4.8M, net income of $1.2M, and an occupancy rate of 85%, alongside an average rent per square foot of $24.50,
total expenses reached $1.9M, and CAPEX was $1.9M. The financial performance for the 1st Quarter of 2023 was slightly
lower, with total revenue at $4.5M, net income at $1.0M, and an occupancy rate of 82%.
The average rent per square foot in this quarter was $24.00, total expenses were noted at $1.7M, and CAPEX was recorded at
$1.7M. Cumulatively, the total for the year 2023 indicates total revenue of $14.5M, net income totaling $3.7M, with an average
occupancy rate of Average85%. The average rent per square foot across these quarters remained constant at $24.50, while total
expenses for the year reached $5.7M, with cumulative CAPEX for the year at $5.7M, illustrating a steady growth trajectory in
the utilization of co-working spaces throughout the year.
